name: Solana FX Market
description: On-chain spot foreign exchange platform enabling merchants to accept payments in one stablecoin and convert to another via order books or AMMs.

name: Morpho Optimizer for Solana
description: Peer-to-peer matching on top of existing money markets to match lenders and borrowers at 100% utilization rates. Matched lenders receive full borrower rate; unmatched tap underlying pools.

name: Fixed-Rate Lending Protocol
description: DeFi fixed-rate lending platform. TradFi is 98% fixed rate, DeFi is almost 0%. Clear gap for protocols like Term Finance or Exactly Finance on Solana.

name: Composable Leverage Protocol
description: Gearbox-style composable leverage for Solana — leveraged yield farming across AMMs, LSTs, and incentive programs. Integrates with Kamino, Drift, Jupiter.

name: Corporate On-chain Bonds
description: Enable revenue-generating on-chain companies to issue transparent blockchain-based bonds without token dilution. On-chain revenue structures as collateral.

name: Interest Rate Swaps for LSTs
description: Forward contracts allowing parties to exchange fixed staking rates for floating rates on LSTs like JitoSOL. LST staking rate as the Solana risk-free rate.

name: Tokenized Vault Standard for Solana
description: ERC-4626 equivalent for Solana — composable yield-bearing tokenized vault standard ensuring interoperability across all yield protocols. $10B+ TVL on Ethereum.

name: Vertical Perps for Niche Markets
description: Perpetual futures for specific verticals — commodities, real estate sectors, or event-based markets. Parcl ($5M TVL) proved the model for real estate; space is wide open.

name: Power Perps
description: Quadratic leverage perpetual contracts enabling non-linear payoff structures. Originally proposed by Paradigm research. Underdeveloped in previous cycles.

name: Everlasting Options
description: Perpetual options contracts without expiry dates. Combines perpetual mechanics with options payoff structures for continuous optionality.

name: Perp Aggregator
description: Aggregator routing perp trades across multiple Solana perp DEXs (Drift, Jupiter Perps, Flash) to optimize execution and pricing.

name: Market-Making Vaults for Order Books
description: Decentralized market-making vaults providing passive liquidity to order book DEXs like Phoenix. Ensures depth isn't dependent on single market makers.

name: Oracle Extractable Value Protocol
description: Mechanisms for applications to capture MEV generated from oracle price updates before arbitrageurs. Application-owned orderflow auctions.

name: Risk Management DAO
description: Risk research org publishing dashboards, frameworks, and risk ratings for Solana DeFi protocols. Paid risk assessments and ratings for institutional allocators.

name: Continuous Prediction Markets via Memecoins
description: Niche trading platforms where memecoins serve as continuous prediction markets with unlimited upside. Unlike binary prediction markets, no cap on returns.

name: Yield Aggregator for Solana
description: Aggregator routing users to optimal yield sources across Solana lending, staking, and farming protocols. Single interface for yield discovery and optimization.

name: Bribe Aggregator / Marketplace
description: Platform aggregating incentive bribes for LST staking governance, Jupiter LFG voting, and other protocol participation. Votium model for Solana.

name: Instadapp for Solana
description: All-in-one DeFi management interface for leveraging, refinancing, and migrating positions across protocols. One-click position management.

name: Solana Perp DEX Appchain
description: Dedicated appchain for perp trading, eliminating mainnet congestion and enabling gas-free trading. Precedent: Zeta/Bullet, dYdX, Hyperliquid all went appchain.

name: DeFi Structured Products Vaults
description: Automated asset management vaults combining leverage, liquidity provision, and hedging strategies. Friktion reached $500M+ TVL before shutting down — space is open.

name: Agent-Native Payment Middleware
description: Three-module orchestration layer: Stripe-like blockchain interface, policy engine for spending rules, and fraud detection. Sits between AI labs and public blockchains.

name: Agentic Payment Protocol
description: Settlement protocol for autonomous software handling high-volume micropayments with deterministic finality and automated dispute resolution between machines.

name: Agent-Aware Compliance Layer
description: Token-level transfer hooks and account state config enforcing KYC/AML rules at the protocol level for AI agents. Prevents rogue agents from violating compliance.

name: Machine-to-Machine Dispute Resolution
description: Automated dispute resolution for agentic payments using smart contracts and LLM-to-LLM communication. Eliminates human intervention for sub-dollar disputes.

name: Open Ride-Sharing Network
description: Decentralized ride-sharing with composable profiles, public ratings, and cross-interface payments. No single-entity dependency. Teleport model on Solana.

name: Open Accommodations Marketplace
description: Airbnb/Booking.com competitor with real-time inventory, open pricing data, and permissionless APIs for any app builder to create a frontend.

name: DePIN-specific SVM Rollup
description: Solana VM-based rollup or L1 optimized specifically for DePIN projects, offering greater control while leveraging existing SVM tooling and ecosystem.

name: ZK-verifiable GPU Cloud
description: On-chain GPU computing using zero-knowledge proofs to verify computations. Enables decentralized AI inferencing at scale with cryptographic proof of work completion.

name: Hardware Financing via RWA
description: Real-world asset tokenization enabling investors to fund physical DePIN infrastructure hardware through blockchain-based financing and fractional ownership.

name: Tokenized Regional Government Securities
description: Blockchain-based government securities trading on DeFi markets with 24/7 access and T+0 settlement, offering global investors exposure to higher-yield regional bonds.

name: Tokenized Regional Green Bonds
description: Tokenize sovereign green bonds on public blockchains for global DeFi participation in emerging market climate commitments. Solves liquidity and transparency issues.

name: Cross-Chain DeFi Capital Connector
description: Neutral protocol standardizing regulatory rules across blockchains, enabling seamless regional securities issuance and trading on global DeFi venues.
